name: TUNE
description: Partner marketing platform with attribution analytics formerly known as HasOffers and MobileAppTracking (MAT).

seo.title: TUNE — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: TUNE: Partner marketing platform with attribution analytics formerly known as HasOffers and MobileAppTracking (MAT).

when_to_use: Affiliate and partner marketing attribution via TUNE platform
Mobile app install tracking with former MAT/HasOffers stack
Performance marketing analytics across affiliate networks

pros: Mature partner marketing platform with long history
Attribution analytics built into partner workflows
cons: Mobile MMP role largely abandoned after MAT
UI feels dated compared with modern tools
Less relevant for direct mobile UA attribution
review.verdict: Reliable partner marketing platform, but treat it as affiliate-first — not the modern mobile MMP TUNE once was.
review.best_for: Brands running structured affiliate and partner programs with attribution down to partner level.
review.not_for: Mobile app teams looking for a modern MMP replacement for AppsFlyer or Adjust.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
